title: Natural Transformations as Depth Morphisms

analysis.object: T690: Natural Transformations as Depth Morphisms depth analysis

deltad_zero.description: Natural transformation between same-depth functors: Deltad=0
deltad_zero.reason: Natural transformations between equal-depth functors are depth-neutral: Deltad=0

naturality_of_hierarchy.description: Naturality of EML depth: d(F(x)) is natural in x; depth assignment is a natural transformation
naturality_of_hierarchy.reason: Depth naturality: the depth function d is natural; d(F(x)) = F(d(x)) for depth-preserving F

depth_breaks.description: Where depth breaks naturality: non-natural assignments correspond to TYPE3 jumps
depth_breaks.reason: Depth non-naturality = TYPE3: where natural transformation fails, depth categorification occurs

analysis.theorem: T690: Natural Transformations as Depth Morphisms (S969).

key_theorem: T690: Natural Transformations as Depth Morphisms (S969).
